title: Super Mario Paint - Moonsong (Cave Story)
description:
It's been stuck in my head recently, and the existing Mario Paint covers of it are pretty old and crusty. I actually got a cheap mini-PC running Win10 recently. I hate it! It's absolutely horrendous! Glad I got out of the Windows ecosystem when I did. But it does allow me to record this without stuff breaking.

I actually made a custom thumbnail for this one but then I discovered that the use of custom thumbnails is locked behind verifying my phone number with YouTube. To even link to it I need to verify my phone number! YouuuuuuuuTuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuube [yells at cloud]
local_file: videos\MediaMunkee\Super Mario Paint - Moonsong (Cave Story) - A5B98jjZcIo.mkv
